audit_items.proof_trace: EIP-7825 per-transaction gas limit enforcement is delegated to REVM (external dependency). This codebase correctly configures cfg_env.tx_gas_limit_cap = Some(MAX_TX_GAS_LIMIT_OSAKA) when Osaka is active, but the actual validation logic resides in REVM's transaction execution, not in alloy-rs/evm wrapper code.
